parameters.content:
## Board Pack generator (T-7) — n8n -> Claude (trace-to-data)

WHAT: the dashboard POSTs the app-computed figure set to this webhook; we build a
trace-to-data prompt, call Claude (claude-opus-4-8, adaptive thinking, JSON schema
output), and return { narrative, recommendations, model }. The APP validates every
returned number against the figure set and blocks publish on any untraceable figure.

SETUP (one-time):
1. Import this workflow, then open the "Anthropic: Messages" HTTP node and select your
   Anthropic credential (key stays here, never in the browser).
   - Easiest: create an "Anthropic" credential (apiKey) and it injects x-api-key.
   - The node already sends the anthropic-version + content-type headers.
2. Activate the workflow. Copy the PRODUCTION webhook URL from the Webhook node.
3. In the dashboard .env set:  VITE_BOARDPACK_WEBHOOK_URL=<that production URL>
   (restart vite). The webhook allows CORS from any origin so the SPA can call it.

NOTES:
- Only does board-pack generation (not a generic Claude proxy): the prompt is built
  from the figureSet shape, and model + max_tokens are pinned here.
- If you'd rather not expose it openly, add a header-auth check on the Webhook node
  and send the same header from boardPackClient.js.
- The app re-validates every number, so a mis-paste or model slip is caught, not shipped.
